$comment: Advanced Note Mover (note-mover-shortcut) -> works out of the box, meant to be edited. Schema verified against the SHIPPED main.js of the resolved release (tag 1.1.2): rulesV2 model + settings.triggers. A rule = {name, destination (target folder), aggregation, triggers:[{criteriaType:'tag', operator:'includes item', value:'<tag>'}], active}. On-save/automatic = triggers.enableOnEditTrigger:true. NOTE: this plugin has no debounce/delay setting; the only timing knob is periodicMovementInterval (minutes), which applies to periodic mode only. THESE THREE RULES ARE EXAMPLES — edit or delete them.
